## Description

## Checklist

- [ ] Description of the change is clear above
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the behavior change
- [ ] `dotnet build` completes with 0 warnings
- [ ] `dotnet test` is green locally
- [ ] No secrets or PII in code, tests, or logs
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
